tiles.title: Ceramic Blue Tile
tiles.description: Premium ceramic tile with a glossy blue glaze finish, perfect for bathrooms.

tiles.title: Modern Geometric White
tiles.description: Weekly Feature: Minimalist geometric patterns for a contemporary living room look.

tiles.title: Royal Marble Grey
tiles.description: New Arrival: Elegant grey marble texture with high durability for high-traffic areas.

tiles.title: Terracotta Rustic Red
tiles.description: Classic terracotta tiles providing a warm, rustic feel to your outdoor patio.

tiles.title: Emerald Glass Mosaic
tiles.description: Beautiful emerald green glass mosaic tiles, ideal for kitchen backsplashes.

tiles.title: Oak Wood-Look Plank
tiles.description: The aesthetic of natural oak wood with the durability of porcelain.

tiles.title: Black Granite Polished
tiles.description: Sleek, polished black granite for a luxurious and bold floor statement.

tiles.title: Victorian Patterned Tile
tiles.description: Intricate Victorian-era patterns for a classic and timeless hallway design.

tiles.title: Slate Textured Anthracite
tiles.description: Dark anthracite slate with a natural anti-slip texture for wet areas.

tiles.title: Concrete Industrial Grey
tiles.description: Industrial style concrete-finish tiles for a modern office or loft apartment.

trending-tiles.title: Rustic Terra Slate
trending-tiles.description: A perfect blend of earthy red and charcoal gray, this slate tile brings a rugged yet sophisticated natural look to any outdoor or indoor accent wall.

trending-tiles.title: Emerald Glazed Ceramic
trending-tiles.description: With a high-gloss finish and deep emerald tones, these tiles are designed to create a bold, luxurious statement in modern kitchens and bathrooms.

trending-tiles.title: Artisan Geometric Mosaic
trending-tiles.description: Intricate patterns meeting monochrome elegance. These handcrafted mosaic tiles add a touch of timeless artistry to your living room flooring.

trending-tiles.title: Industrial Concrete Texture
trending-tiles.description: Minimalist and durable. This concrete-textured tile is ideal for high-traffic areas, offering a clean, raw aesthetic for urban-style interiors.
